title: Comfy
description: The modpack made for your comfort, to enjoy your game on your long sessions!
body:
English 🇬🇧
Welcome to your new favourite modpack!


## ❔**About** **Comfy** is a combination of the most effective performance mods, and as much comfort features as possible. - Manage your sessions directly in-game - Play with your friends without a server, right from the main menu! - Performance boost - Lots of customization - And much more!
## ⚠️ **Disclaimer** This modpack is not best suited for slow connections / computers. It consists of many small mods, with one of them taking tens of megabytes. All in all, you'll download ~60 MiB.
Enjoy :)
